roa.docketEntryComment: DA NON OPP TO SET ASIDE PLEA OF GUILTY FILE
DEF MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT, FILED

/CAL  MOTION TO VACATE PURSUANT TO PC1473,7; DA NON-OPP TO SET ASIDE/NP/XTHE PEOPLE DO NOT OPPOSE PETITIONER'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE THE GUILTYPLEA,ENTER A NOT GUILTY PLEA AND SET ASIDE THE CONVICTION AND SENTENCE OF 04-29-98/MO GRTD/X: PLEA DATE:04-29-98/X: SENTENCE DATE:04-29-98/ /X: THE COURT FINDS DEFENDANT WAS NOT PROPERLY ADVISED OF THE POTENTIAL CONSEQUENCES OFA GUILTY PLEA, /CTORD: THE CONVICTION AND SENTENCE WERE ILLEGAL AND INVALID,  PREJUDICIAL ERROR DAMAGED THE DEFENDANT,  ACCORDINGLY, THE GUILTY PLEAENTERED ON 04-29-98 IS SET ASIDE A NOT GUILTY PLEA IS ENTERED, THE SENTENCE ENTERED ON 04-28-98 ARE HEREBY VACATED, /X: THERE BEING NO NEW PLEA ENTERED, THE COURT ORDERS THE MATTER DISMISSED/MO PC 1385: INTEREST OF JUSTICE/X: ORDER SIGNED AND FILED/
DISMISS IN VIEW OF PLEA TO CT #1
DEF FTA, BWI, B/S $15,000, RET TO M11
